title: Friday Sermon 22 March 1985
description:
A Review of the Pakistani Government's 'White Paper' Qadiyaniyyat — A Grave Threat to Islam: Their Ulema (A Moment for the Reflection for All Muslims).

In 1984 the Islamic government of Pakistan set aside all Islamic injunctions and took upon itself the burden of depriving the Ahmadi Muslims of many basic human rights including religious and social freedoms. In an attempt to justify this action, the government of Pakistan published a so-called White Paper under the title 'Qadiyaniyyat - Islam Key Liyey Sangin Khatrah' ['Qadiyaniyyat - A Grave Threat to Islam'].

Although there was nothing new in this so-called White Paper and the Community literature already included detailed answers to all the issues which were raised, nevertheless Hazrat Mirza Tahir Ahmad - Khalifatul Masih IV, the then Imam of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community, answered these allegations in a series of Friday Sermons.

In truth they have greater fear of you in their hearts than of Allah.  That is because they are a people devoid of reason.

They will not fight you unitedly except from within fortified strongholds or from behind high walls.  There is much hostility among them.  Thou thinkest them to be united but their hearts are divided.  That is because they are a people who have no sense.

('The Holy Quran'.  al Hashr [The Gathering]: 14, 15).

The enemies of Islam are instilled with the fear of the Truth. The intensity of this fear is such that it even makes them overlook the fear of God. They are always eager to attack the Ahmadiyya Community while staying within protected fortifications and by seeking help from their supportive governments. However, they are unable to defend Islam from the accusations of its actual enemies. The reason that keeps them united is the fear of Ahmadiyya Community’s victory. This unity is very fragile and temporary. It should be explained that the Ahmadiyya Community was not responsible for the riots in 1953. Supposedly pious Islamic Clergy are utilizing valuable alms money solely for opposing the Ahmadiyya Community and to instigate hatred against us. Muslims all over the world were in a morally dead state before the advent of the Promised Messiah (peace be upon him).  The  Ahmadiyya Community had already spread all over the world before the creation of Pakistan and this process did not start after that as is evident from the work of  Hazrat Chaudhry Fateh Muhammad Sial (Allah be pleased with him) and Maulana Naseem Saifi, Missionary In-charge Nigeria. In accordance with the Prophecy of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, the actual root cause for every riot is the so-called Muslim clergy. Every riot stems from them and returns to them. Allah sends a new Prophet at the time of every latest trouble and disaster. The only solution to all the troubles Muslims face today, lies in believing Hazrat Mirza Ghulam Ahmad (peace be upon him) to be the Promised Messiah.

In this sermon His Holiness points out the prophecies made by the Holy Prophet Muhammad ﷺ about the evil character of the so-called divines of the Latter Days detailing references from non-Ahmadi Muslim sources showing how these prophecies were fulfilled in the present day Maulvis.

The text http://www.alislam.org/urdu/sermon/FST19850322-UR.pdf
English translation http://store.alislam.org/theirulema.html
